title: 「As 句」句型
titleZh: 「As 句」表達「隨着時間或情況變化」
titleEn: Using As to describe changes over time

source.file: Sentence Structure 30 -「As 句」表達「隨着時間或情況變化」.pdf
omissions: English rule headings and explanations translated from Chinese are faithful editorial translations.

formula: As + subject + change or development, subject + corresponding change.

formulas.formula: As + subject + change or development, subject + corresponding change.
Subject + corresponding change + as + subject + change or development.

example: As I get older, I tend to realise that family matters most.
exampleZh: 隨着年紀漸長，我逐漸明白家人最重要。

examples.en: As I get older, I tend to realise that family matters most.
examples.zh: 隨着年紀漸長，我逐漸明白家人最重要。

meaning.zh: 表示一件事情逐漸改變時，另一件事情也同時發生相應的改變。

rules.en: In this lesson, as means ‘as/while something gradually changes’: one situation develops and another changes with it.
rules.zh: As 在本課表示「隨着」：一件事情逐漸改變時，另一件事情也同時發生相應的改變。
examples: As the weather gets colder, people wear thicker clothes.

rules.en: The as-clause must contain a complete subject and verb.
rules.zh: As 後面必須接完整子句，包含主語和動詞。
examples: As children grow, they become more independent.

rules.en: The as-clause may come first or last. Use a comma after it when it comes first; a comma is generally unnecessary when it comes last.
rules.zh: As 子句可以放在前面或後面。放在前面時通常需要逗號；放在後面時一般不需要逗號。
examples: As the evening gets later, the streets become quieter.
The streets become quieter as the evening gets later.

rules.en: This lesson does not practise other meanings of as, such as ‘because’ or a simple ‘when’.
rules.zh: 本課只練習表示逐漸變化的「隨着」，不練習 As 表示「因為」或一般「當……的時候」的用法。
examples: As it was raining, we stayed indoors.

rules.en: Use get older, rather than get old, to emphasise age increasing gradually.
rules.zh: 表達年紀逐漸增長時，通常使用 get older；它比 get old 更適合表示持續的變化。
examples: As I get older, I understand my parents better.

benefits.en: It shows two changes happening together.
benefits.zh: 這個句型可以清楚表示：當一種情況逐漸發展時，另一種情況亦會隨之改變。
你可以把兩項互相關連的變化放進同一句，而不需要分開寫成兩句。

benefits.en: It is useful for describing trends.
benefits.zh: 這個句型適合描述社會、科技、教育、健康和環境等方面的發展趨勢。
你可以使用這個句型描述自己的想法、能力、感受或習慣如何隨時間改變。

benefits.en: It gives you more sentence variety.
benefits.zh: As 子句可以放在句首或句尾，讓你的說話和寫作不會經常使用相同的句子開頭。

sourceOmissions: The PDF presents the Important Rules mainly in Chinese; their English versions are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using as to show that one situation changes or develops together with another over time.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 as 改寫以下句子，表示一種情況逐漸改變或發展時，另一種情況亦會隨之改變。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: With age, I understand my parents better.
questions.promptZh: 隨着年齡增長，我更了解父母。
questions.answer: As I get older, I understand my parents better.
questions.answerZh: 隨着年紀漸長，我更了解父母。
questions.highlight: As I get older, I understand my parents better.

questions.prompt: When the weather gradually becomes colder, people wear thicker clothes.
questions.promptZh: 當天氣逐漸變冷時，人們會穿上較厚的衣服。
questions.answer: As the weather gets colder, people wear thicker clothes.
questions.answerZh: 隨着天氣變冷，人們會穿上較厚的衣服。
questions.highlight: As the weather gets colder, people wear thicker clothes.

questions.prompt: The more Mia practises, the clearer her pronunciation becomes.
questions.promptZh: 米婭練習得越多，她的發音便越清晰。
questions.answer: As Mia practises more, her pronunciation becomes clearer.
questions.answerZh: 隨着米婭增加練習，她的發音變得更加清晰。
questions.highlight: As Mia practises more, her pronunciation becomes clearer.

questions.prompt: The sun rises, and the sky gradually becomes brighter at the same time.
questions.promptZh: 太陽升起時，天空亦逐漸變得明亮。
questions.answer: As the sun rises, the sky becomes brighter.
questions.answerZh: 隨着太陽升起，天空逐漸變得明亮。
questions.highlight: As the sun rises, the sky becomes brighter.

questions.prompt: Over the years, children grow and become more independent.
questions.promptZh: 經過多年成長，兒童會變得更加獨立。
questions.answer: As children grow, they become more independent.
questions.answerZh: 隨着兒童成長，他們會變得更加獨立。
questions.highlight: As children grow, they become more independent.

questions.prompt: The train moves farther from the city, and passengers gradually see fewer buildings.
questions.promptZh: 火車逐漸駛離城市，乘客看到的建築物亦逐漸減少。
questions.answer: As the train moves farther from the city, passengers see fewer buildings.
questions.answerZh: 隨着火車逐漸駛離城市，乘客看到的建築物亦越來越少。
questions.highlight: As the train moves farther from the city, passengers see fewer buildings.

questions.prompt: While the soup is cooling, it gradually becomes thicker.
questions.promptZh: 湯在冷卻的過程中逐漸變得濃稠。
questions.answer: The soup becomes thicker as it cools.
questions.answerZh: 湯會隨着溫度下降而變得更加濃稠。
questions.highlight: The soup becomes thicker as it cools.

questions.prompt: A longer queue usually makes people less patient.
questions.promptZh: 隊伍越長，人們通常越沒有耐性。
questions.answer: As the queue gets longer, people usually become less patient.
questions.answerZh: 隨着隊伍變長，人們通常會變得較沒有耐性。
questions.highlight: As the queue gets longer, people usually become less patient.

questions.prompt: The more words we learn, the easier reading becomes.
questions.promptZh: 我們學會的單字越多，閱讀便越容易。
questions.answer: As we learn more words, reading becomes easier.
questions.answerZh: 隨着我們學會更多單字，閱讀會變得更加容易。
questions.highlight: As we learn more words, reading becomes easier.

questions.prompt: Later in the evening, the streets usually become quieter.
questions.promptZh: 夜晚越深，街道通常會變得越安靜。
questions.answer: The streets usually become quieter as the evening gets later.
questions.answerZh: 街道通常會隨着夜色漸深而變得更加安靜。
questions.highlight: The streets usually become quieter as the evening gets later.

questions.prompt: The more money Ben saves, the closer he gets to his goal of buying a bicycle.
questions.promptZh: 本儲蓄的金錢越多，便越接近購買單車的目標。
questions.answer: As Ben saves more money, he gets closer to his goal of buying a bicycle.
questions.answerZh: 隨着本儲蓄更多金錢，他逐漸接近購買單車的目標。
questions.highlight: As Ben saves more money, he gets closer to his goal of buying a bicycle.

questions.prompt: The taller the plant grows, the more water it needs.
questions.promptZh: 植物長得越高，所需的水便越多。
questions.answer: As the plant grows taller, it needs more water.
questions.answerZh: 隨着植物長高，它需要更多水分。
questions.highlight: As the plant grows taller, it needs more water.

questions.prompt: Over time, mobile phones have become more powerful, and people have begun using them for more tasks.
questions.promptZh: 隨着時間過去，手提電話的功能變得更強大，人們亦開始用它們處理更多事情。
questions.answer: As mobile phones have become more powerful, people have begun using them for more tasks.
questions.answerZh: 隨着手提電話的功能變得更強大，人們亦開始用它們處理更多事情。
questions.highlight: As mobile phones have become more powerful, people have begun using them for more tasks.

questions.prompt: During the lesson, the questions gradually become more difficult.
questions.promptZh: 課堂進行期間，題目逐漸變得更加困難。
questions.answer: As the lesson progresses, the questions become more difficult.
questions.answerZh: 隨着課堂進行，題目會逐漸變得更加困難。
questions.highlight: As the lesson progresses, the questions become more difficult.

questions.prompt: Ava’s baby daughter grows older each month and sleeps for longer at night.
questions.promptZh: 艾娃的女嬰逐月長大，晚上睡眠的時間亦變得更長。
questions.answer: As Ava’s baby daughter grows older, she sleeps for longer at night.
questions.answerZh: 隨着艾娃的女嬰長大，她晚上睡眠的時間亦變得更長。
questions.highlight: As Ava’s baby daughter grows older, she sleeps for longer at night.

questions.prompt: The more often I speak English, the more confident I become.
questions.promptZh: 我越經常說英語，便變得越有信心。
questions.answer: I become more confident as I speak English more often.
questions.answerZh: 我會隨着說英語的次數增加而變得更有信心。
questions.highlight: I become more confident as I speak English more often.

questions.prompt: When more people enter the room, it gradually becomes warmer.
questions.promptZh: 當更多人進入房間時，房間會逐漸變暖。
questions.answer: The room becomes warmer as more people enter it.
questions.answerZh: 房間會隨着更多人進入而逐漸變暖。
questions.highlight: The room becomes warmer as more people enter it.

questions.prompt: We spent more time together over the years, and our friendship became stronger.
questions.promptZh: 多年來，我們相處的時間增加了，彼此的友誼亦變得更加深厚。
questions.answer: Our friendship became stronger as we spent more time together.
questions.answerZh: 我們的友誼隨着相處時間增加而變得更加深厚。
questions.highlight: Our friendship became stronger as we spent more time together.

questions.prompt: An increase in demand often causes prices to rise.
questions.promptZh: 需求增加通常會導致價格上升。
questions.answer: Prices often rise as demand increases.
questions.answerZh: 價格通常會隨着需求增加而上升。
questions.highlight: Prices often rise as demand increases.

questions.prompt: Each year, more tourists arrived, and the town became busier.
questions.promptZh: 每年都有更多遊客到訪，而這個小鎮亦變得更加繁忙。
questions.answer: The town became busier as more tourists arrived each year.
questions.answerZh: 這個小鎮隨着每年到訪的遊客增加而變得更加繁忙。
questions.highlight: The town became busier as more tourists arrived each year.

questions.prompt: The steeper the road becomes, the harder cyclists have to work.
questions.promptZh: 道路變得越斜，單車手便要越用力。
questions.answer: As the road gets steeper, cyclists have to work harder.
questions.answerZh: 隨着道路變得更斜，單車手需要更加用力。
questions.highlight: As the road gets steeper, cyclists have to work harder.

questions.prompt: The team is meeting more often because the deadline is getting closer.
questions.promptZh: 由於限期逐漸接近，團隊開會的次數正在增加。
questions.answer: As the deadline gets closer, the team is meeting more often.
questions.answerZh: 隨着限期逐漸接近，團隊開會的次數正在增加。
questions.highlight: As the deadline gets closer, the team is meeting more often.

questions.prompt: People usually make decisions more quickly after they gain more experience.
questions.promptZh: 人們累積更多經驗後，通常能更快作出決定。
questions.answer: As people gain more experience, they usually make decisions more quickly.
questions.answerZh: 隨着人們累積更多經驗，他們通常能更快作出決定。
questions.highlight: As people gain more experience, they usually make decisions more quickly.

questions.prompt: A rising river level makes nearby paths increasingly unsafe.
questions.promptZh: 河流水位上升，令附近的小徑變得越來越不安全。
questions.answer: As the river level rises, nearby paths become increasingly unsafe.
questions.answerZh: 隨着河流水位上升，附近的小徑變得越來越不安全。
questions.highlight: As the river level rises, nearby paths become increasingly unsafe.

questions.prompt: Technological development causes some jobs to change or disappear over time.
questions.promptZh: 科技發展使部分工作隨時間改變或消失。
questions.answer: As technology develops, some jobs change or disappear.
questions.answerZh: 隨着科技發展，部分工作會改變或消失。
questions.highlight: As technology develops, some jobs change or disappear.

questions.prompt: The discussion developed, and the audience became more engaged.
questions.promptZh: 討論逐步深入，觀眾亦變得更加投入。
questions.answer: The audience became more engaged as the discussion developed.
questions.answerZh: 觀眾隨着討論逐步深入而變得更加投入。
questions.highlight: The audience became more engaged as the discussion developed.

questions.prompt: The medicine gradually began to work, and the patient’s breathing became easier.
questions.promptZh: 藥物逐漸開始發揮作用，病人的呼吸亦變得比較順暢。
questions.answer: The patient’s breathing became easier as the medicine gradually began to work.
questions.answerZh: 病人的呼吸隨着藥物逐漸開始發揮作用而變得比較順暢。
questions.highlight: The patient’s breathing became easier as the medicine gradually began to work.

questions.prompt: The closer the morning rush hour comes, the more crowded public transport becomes.
questions.promptZh: 早上繁忙時間越接近，公共交通工具便越擠迫。
questions.answer: Public transport becomes more crowded as the morning rush hour approaches.
questions.answerZh: 公共交通工具會隨着早上繁忙時間接近而變得更加擠迫。
questions.highlight: Public transport becomes more crowded as the morning rush hour approaches.

questions.prompt: The building’s equipment grew older over the years, and the building became less useful.
questions.promptZh: 多年來，大樓的設備逐漸老化，大樓亦變得不再那麼實用。
questions.answer: The building became less useful as its equipment grew older.
questions.answerZh: 這座大樓隨着設備老化而變得不再那麼實用。
questions.highlight: The building became less useful as its equipment grew older.

questions.prompt: Reading more biographies gradually increased my interest in history.
questions.promptZh: 閱讀更多人物傳記逐漸增加了我對歷史的興趣。
questions.answer: My interest in history gradually increased as I read more biographies.
questions.answerZh: 我對歷史的興趣隨着閱讀更多人物傳記而逐漸增加。
questions.highlight: My interest in history gradually increased as I read more biographies.

questions.prompt: A growing school population creates a need for more study space in the library.
questions.promptZh: 學校的學生人數增加，使圖書館需要更多溫習空間。
questions.answer: As the school population grows, the library needs more study space.
questions.answerZh: 隨着學校的學生人數增加，圖書館需要更多溫習空間。
questions.highlight: As the school population grows, the library needs more study space.

questions.prompt: The growing popularity of online shopping puts greater pressure on delivery services.
questions.promptZh: 網上購物日益普及，為送貨服務帶來更大壓力。
questions.answer: As online shopping becomes more common, delivery services face greater pressure.
questions.answerZh: 隨着網上購物日益普及，送貨服務面對更大壓力。
questions.highlight: As online shopping becomes more common, delivery services face greater pressure.

questions.prompt: When a company expands, communication between departments becomes more important.
questions.promptZh: 公司擴展時，部門之間的溝通會變得更加重要。
questions.answer: As the company expands, communication between departments becomes more important.
questions.answerZh: 隨着公司擴展，部門之間的溝通會變得更加重要。
questions.highlight: As the company expands, communication between departments becomes more important.

questions.prompt: Warmer seas cause some marine animals to move to cooler areas.
questions.promptZh: 海水變暖使部分海洋生物遷移到較涼的地區。
questions.answer: As the sea becomes warmer, some marine animals move to cooler areas.
questions.answerZh: 隨着海水變暖，部分海洋生物會遷移到較涼的地區。
questions.highlight: As the sea becomes warmer, some marine animals move to cooler areas.

questions.prompt: People spend more time sitting nowadays, so regular exercise is becoming more important.
questions.promptZh: 現今人們花更多時間坐着，因此恆常運動正變得更加重要。
questions.answer: As people spend more time sitting, regular exercise is becoming more important.
questions.answerZh: 隨着人們花更多時間坐着，恆常運動正變得更加重要。
questions.highlight: As people spend more time sitting, regular exercise is becoming more important.

questions.prompt: The busier the station becomes, the greater the need for clear signs.
questions.promptZh: 車站越繁忙，對清晰指示牌的需求便越大。
questions.answer: The need for clear signs increases as the station becomes busier.
questions.answerZh: 對清晰指示牌的需求會隨着車站變得更加繁忙而增加。
questions.highlight: The need for clear signs increases as the station becomes busier.

questions.prompt: The more people become involved, the harder the problem is to solve.
questions.promptZh: 牽涉的人越多，問題便越難解決。
questions.answer: The problem becomes harder to solve as more people become involved.
questions.answerZh: 問題會隨着更多人牽涉其中而變得更加難以解決。
questions.highlight: The problem becomes harder to solve as more people become involved.

questions.prompt: Growth among large online platforms may cause local shops to lose customers.
questions.promptZh: 大型網上平台的發展可能令本地商店流失顧客。
questions.answer: Local shops may lose customers as large online platforms grow.
questions.answerZh: 本地商店可能會隨着大型網上平台發展而流失顧客。
questions.highlight: Local shops may lose customers as large online platforms grow.

questions.prompt: The teacher gave the children more chances to speak over time. Their confidence grew.
questions.promptZh: 老師逐漸給予孩子更多發言機會。他們的信心亦有所提升。
questions.answer: The children became more confident as the teacher gave them more chances to speak.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們隨着老師給予更多發言機會而變得更有信心。
questions.highlight: The children became more confident as the teacher gave them more chances to speak.

questions.prompt: Worn machine parts cause the machine to make more noise over time.
questions.promptZh: 機器零件逐漸損耗，使機器發出更多噪音。
questions.answer: The machine makes more noise as its parts wear out.
questions.answerZh: 機器會隨着零件逐漸損耗而發出更多噪音。
questions.highlight: The machine makes more noise as its parts wear out.

questions.prompt: Growing cities require governments to plan transport more carefully.
questions.promptZh: 城市不斷發展，政府需要更仔細地規劃交通。
questions.answer: As cities grow, governments must plan transport more carefully.
questions.answerZh: 隨着城市發展，政府必須更仔細地規劃交通。
questions.highlight: As cities grow, governments must plan transport more carefully.

questions.prompt: Students are expected to work more independently when they move into higher classes.
questions.promptZh: 學生升讀更高年級時，學校會期望他們更獨立地完成學習任務。
questions.answer: As students move into higher classes, they are expected to work more independently.
questions.answerZh: 隨着學生升讀更高年級，學校會期望他們更獨立地完成學習任務。
questions.highlight: As students move into higher classes, they are expected to work more independently.

questions.prompt: Rising living costs force families to plan their spending more carefully.
questions.promptZh: 生活成本上升，迫使家庭更仔細地規劃開支。
questions.answer: As the cost of living rises, families have to plan their spending more carefully.
questions.answerZh: 隨着生活成本上升，家庭必須更仔細地規劃開支。
questions.highlight: As the cost of living rises, families have to plan their spending more carefully.

questions.prompt: Information now spreads more quickly online, which makes checking facts increasingly important.
questions.promptZh: 現今資訊在網上傳播得更快，使核實資料變得越來越重要。
questions.answer: As information spreads more quickly online, checking facts becomes increasingly important.
questions.answerZh: 隨着資訊在網上傳播得更快，核實資料變得越來越重要。
questions.highlight: As information spreads more quickly online, checking facts becomes increasingly important.

questions.prompt: An ageing population creates a greater need for hospital services for older patients.
questions.promptZh: 人口老化增加了年長病人對醫院服務的需求。
questions.answer: As the population ages, hospitals need more services for older patients.
questions.answerZh: 隨着人口老化，醫院需要為年長病人提供更多服務。
questions.highlight: As the population ages, hospitals need more services for older patients.

questions.prompt: Remote working is becoming more common, and employees may therefore feel less connected to their colleagues.
questions.promptZh: 遙距工作日益普遍，因此僱員與同事之間的聯繫可能會減弱。
questions.answer: Employees may feel less connected to their colleagues as remote working becomes more common.
questions.answerZh: 隨着遙距工作日益普遍，僱員可能會覺得自己與同事之間的聯繫減弱。
questions.highlight: Employees may feel less connected to their colleagues as remote working becomes more common.

questions.prompt: The more complex a project becomes, the clearer the value of regular feedback becomes.
questions.promptZh: 項目越複雜，定期提供意見的重要性便越明顯。
questions.answer: The value of regular feedback becomes clearer as a project becomes more complex.
questions.answerZh: 定期提供意見的價值會隨着項目變得更加複雜而越來越明顯。
questions.highlight: The value of regular feedback becomes clearer as a project becomes more complex.

questions.prompt: Environmental problems are becoming more serious, so communities are looking for practical solutions.
questions.promptZh: 環境問題正變得更加嚴重，因此各個社區正在尋找實際的解決方法。
questions.answer: As environmental problems become more serious, communities are looking for practical solutions.
questions.answerZh: 隨着環境問題變得更加嚴重，各個社區正在尋找實際的解決方法。
questions.highlight: As environmental problems become more serious, communities are looking for practical solutions.

questions.prompt: When learners become more fluent, they can focus less on individual words and more on the whole message.
questions.promptZh: 學習者變得更加流利後，便可以減少專注個別單字，並更着重整體信息。
questions.answer: As learners become more fluent, they can focus less on individual words and more on the whole message.
questions.answerZh: 隨着學習者變得更加流利，他們可以減少專注個別單字，並更着重整體信息。
questions.highlight: As learners become more fluent, they can focus less on individual words and more on the whole message.

questions.prompt: The growing reliance of organisations on digital systems makes protecting personal data increasingly important.
questions.promptZh: 機構日益依賴數碼系統，使保護個人資料變得越來越重要。
questions.answer: As organisations rely more heavily on digital systems, protecting personal data becomes increasingly important.
questions.answerZh: 隨着機構更加依賴數碼系統，保護個人資料變得越來越重要。
questions.highlight: As organisations rely more heavily on digital systems, protecting personal data becomes increasingly important.
